title: aerangis boutonii
intro: Aerangis boutonii, also known as the Bouton's Aerangis or the bouton orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the Aerangis genus. The medicinal properties of Aerangis boutonii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Aerangis boutonii include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Aerangis boutonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
